per_query.question: What are the names (not symbol) of the top 5 non-ETF stocks listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) that had more up days than down days in 2017? (Up days: closing price > opening price; Down days: closing price < opening price)
per_query.ground_truth:
MFA Financial, Inc
Argo Group International Holdings, Ltd
HDFC Bank Limited Common Stock
Albany International Corporation Common Stock
DTE Energy Company

trials.answer:
Essex Property Trust, Inc
General Dynamics Corporation
Mettler-Toledo International, Inc
Saratoga Investment Corp
Sunlands Technology Group
Total: 5

steps.reasoning: Need to find non-ETF stocks on NYSE (Listing Exchange='N'), then for each get their 2017 trading data to count up days vs down days, rank by net up days, and return top 5 company names. Step 1: get all NYSE non-ETF symbols from SQLite. Step 2: build a UNION ALL query in DuckDB to count up/down days per ticker for 2017. Step 3: get company names for top 5 symbols from SQLite.

steps.query_used: SELECT Symbol FROM stockinfo WHERE ETF='N' AND "Listing Exchange"='N' AND "Test Issue"='N'

SELECT symbol, net_up FROM (
  SELECT 'AEFC' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AEFC WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AIN' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AIN WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AIV' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AIV WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AIZP' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AIZP WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AJRD' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AJRD WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AL' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AL WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AMN' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AMN WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AMP' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net_up 
  FROM AMP WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL

    COUNT(

steps.query_used: SELECT "Company Description" FROM stockinfo WHERE Symbol IN ('SYM1','SYM2','SYM3','SYM4','SYM5') ORDER BY Symbol IN ('SYM1','SYM2','SYM3','SYM4','SYM5')
